name: 道の駅 くしま
desc: JR串間駅から徒歩3分、全国でも珍しい「まちなか」にある道の駅。宮崎最南端、鹿児島県境に位置し、串間活〆ぶりプリ丼が名物。
descEn: Three minutes on foot from JR Kushima Station, making it one of the rare 'downtown' roadside stations in Japan. Located at Miyazaki's southernmost point near the Kagoshima border, known for its fresh yellowtail rice bowl.
